h2: Before and After: From No Character to Cozy
How to Get the Modern Farmhouse Living Room Look

paragraphs: What we love: With an eye-catching, wood-and-white coffered ceiling, this living room is equal parts airy and inviting. A pair of traditional spindle chairs face a softer set of chambray-blue slipper armchairs offering flexibility to converse or pull closer to the traditional lime-washed stone fireplace. The blue and white color scheme and rope-wrapped chandelier hint at a nautical vibe, apropos for this home’s lakeside setting.Fireplace factor: Designed with an oversized, glass-free view of the fire, Heat & Glo’s Phoenix TrueView Gas Fireplace combines the appeal of a traditional open hearth with the convenience and ease of gas. Set the mood by piping in the familiar crackling and popping sounds of a fire burning via this fireplace’s optional Bluetooth® speaker.

What we love: This contemporary living room strikes a balance between modern and masculine. Despite the preponderance of black, the space remains bright thanks to ample natural light and reflective finishes. Soft leather and layered textures make the oversized sofa an inviting spot to get cozy and Netflix the night away.

Fireplace factor: To maintain a clean appearance while combining a TV and fireplace on one wall, check out our Passive Heat Kit, which allows you to safely install a TV 12 inches above your gas fireplace without a noisy fan to interfere or a bulky mantel to mess with the wall’s design. Passive Heat requires unobtrusive side, front (pictured above) or ceiling registers and is available with our Cosmo, Mezzo (pictured above) and Primo gas fireplaces.

What we love: Contrasting modern furnishings with a knotty pine ceiling and aged steel-clad fireplace wall grounds this airy space with down-to-earth elements. Adding to the sense of balance are the symmetrical tables, wood bowl accents and abstract artwork on either side of the fireplace. A restrained color palette and use of accents keeps any one element from overwhelming the space.
Fireplace factor: With an ultra-tall viewing area, the Enlight Single-Sided Gas Fireplace from Stellar by Heat & Glo creates a timeless-yet-modern look that fits this room to a tee.

What we love: Embracing a mid-century modern-rustic feel, this living room exudes a cheerful mood, with hues of blue mixed with black and white. A mod white pendant light and atomic nesting coffee tables add polish and nostalgia, while wood storage (just for show, this is a gas-burning fireplace after all!) and an extra-long oak mantel and raised hearth beam adds rustic warmth.

Fireplace factor: Placing the TV next to the fireplace allows for maximal comfort (no craning the neck to see the TV!) and frees up space for art above the mantel. Heat & Glo’s SlimLine series (pictured above) is well-suited for compact spaces like this one, with a slender profile that fits where most gas fireplaces can’t.

What we love: With separate zones for socializing and TV-viewing, this open-concept living space exemplifies the importance of using coordinated materials to tie a space together. Complementary neutral tones coordinate with the fireplace surround, flooring, rug and upholstery, giving a sense of calm and cohesion. Shapely, traditional tufted armchairs accompany modern farmhouse elements like horizontal shiplap, dried cotton branch arrangement and hickory flooring.

Fireplace factor: Old-school masonry fireplaces are a time, money and energy suck. A gas fireplace insert from Heat & Glo can fit directly into your existing fireplace, enhancing its heating efficiency and appearance. The Escape Gas FireBrick Insert (pictured above) offers a large view of the fire, as well as bone-warming radiant heat, courtesy of patented FireBrick interior, all controlled with the tap of a finger on a touchscreen remote.

What we love: A white-washed color palette allows the focus of this pared-back coastal living room to stay where it should: On the expansive views of the beach. The beamed ceiling is a nod to the coastal location, while a mix of natural pieces blend with contemporary designs, including the pair of sleek white leather armchairs.

Fireplace factor: With wall space being a premium in smaller living rooms, accommodating both a TV and fireplace can be a design challenge. Heat & Glo’s Passive Heat Kit allows you to safely install a TV just 12 inches above your gas fireplace without a noisy fan to interfere, no mantel required. In terms of special venting, Passive Heat requires unobtrusive side (pictured above), front or ceiling registers and is available with our Cosmo (pictured above), Mezzo and Primo gas fireplaces.
Feeling inspired to embark on a home makeover of your own? Contact a dealer today to schedule a no-obligation, no-hassle consultation.

The Mezzo linear gas fireplace features one of the cleanest designs in the industry, punctuated by end-to-end ribbon flames. A wide range of sizes and styles help make Mezzo yours – including trendy fire bed materials and timeless log sets – and heat-management options so you can enjoy the beauty of this linear fireplace near your TV. Available in 36-inch, 48-inch, 60-inch and 72-inch widths.

Transform your home with our top-of-the-line Escape gas fireplace insert. The biggest, clearest view of the fire, hand-painted logs and efficient heating take your fireplace from unused to unbelievable. Available in 30 and 35-inch widths.

Enjoy a sophisticated fire at a smaller footprint, thanks to the sleek design of the Cosmo gas linear fireplace. Personalize the look with a range of fronts, log sets and interior options. Heat management makes it safe to install your TV above the fireplace, with just mere inches in between. Available in 32, 36 and 42-inch widths.

The best-selling 6K/8K gas fireplace pairs powerful performance with refined design that brings a striking focal point to your space. Getting the right look is simple: choose from three Design Packages – Modern Farmhouse, Organic Modern, or New Traditional – each offering a curated set of fireplace front, interior panels and logs designed to match your home style. And with thoughtful features like voice control and adjustable heat management, it’s easy to set the mood and enjoy the fire your way, year‑round.
Make the most of your space with the most fireplace for a slender 16” profile. The popular SlimLine gas fireplace is ideal for nestling into tight spots and adding extra comfort to your couch time.

Evoke an open-hearth experience so real, friends may ask to add another log to the fire. We pioneered the open gas fireplace with a large, glass-free view so you get the ultimate combination of authenticity and innovation. Mild heat settings allow for openness without feeling overheated, and you can even stream your tunes or the crackling of a fire through built-in Bluetooth speakers. Not available in Canada.

Create a fireside experience that complements your sleek style. Built-in heat management makes it safe to install your TV above this fireplace. Tailor it to your interior design style by choosing from a range of interior panels, fire bed materials, and hand-painted logs. Available in 48-inch, 60-inch and 72-inch widths.
A young Minnesota family adds personality and warmth with a budget-friendly living room remodel.
See how one interior designer makes her client’s modern farmhouse dreams come true, putting fireplaces center stage in living rooms of every size.
Browse our photo gallery to find a fireplace design that reflects your unique style.
